description: Refactor the 'processTransaction' method in 'PaymentProcessor.java' to use a Parameter Object pattern. Create a new class named 'TransactionRequest' to encapsulate the seven existing arguments (merchantId, amount, currency, cardNum, cvv, expiry, note). Update 'PaymentProcessor.processTransaction' to accept a single 'TransactionRequest' instance and refactor all callers in 'App.java' and 'PaymentServiceTest.java' to use the new object. Ensure the project compiles and all tests pass.
